label: on_voice
text: She came in wanting to cover a scar she never chose. We spent the consult picking flowers that actually meant something to her. Now it's hers. 🌸 DM me to start your design.
why: Opens on the client; names the consult; soft CTA; one approved emoji; sensitive without pity.

label: on_voice
text: First tattoo? Good. We'll go slow. Free consult, no pressure to book — bring the idea even if you can't draw it, and ask me anything. No dumb questions.
why: Approved free-consult claim; calm women-first register; speaks to the nervous first-timer.

label: on_voice
text: Neo-traditional color lives or dies on saturation. Bold lines, packed color, built to still read bright once it's healed. That's the work. #neotraditionaltattoo #floraltattoo #austintattoo
why: Craft over hype; specific hashtags; no superlatives; confidence without bravado.

label: on_voice
text: This room is women-first on purpose. Private, appointment-only, no rush and no one talking over you. Bring your idea — we'll take our time. 🤍
why: Approved appointment-only claim; safe-space positioning; approved emoji; warm invite.

label: on_voice
text: Floral half-sleeve we built over three sessions — peonies for her mom, wildflowers for where she grew up. Healed and settled now. 🌷 Consults are free — link in bio.
why: Client's story carries it; custom/approved consult claim; soft CTA; approved emoji.

label: off_voice
reason: hard near-miss: right topic, girlboss hype voice + banned emoji + rule-of-three + hard close
text: Unleash your inner queen 👑✨ This stunning floral cover-up is bold, beautiful, and SO you. You deserve this, babe — treat yourself and slay. Book now! 🔥
why: Same topic (floral cover-up) but every banned move: queen/slay/babe girlboss hype, banned emoji, rule-of-three, hard close. The subtle fail the posting gate must catch.

label: off_voice
reason: unapproved claims: superlative + pain promise + price/discount + walk-in
text: BEST tattoos in Austin, 100% painless guaranteed. $50 flash Friday — walk in today, no appointment needed! Voted #1 studio.
why: Superlatives, pain promise, price/discount, walk-in framing — all outside approved claims and against the appointment-only positioning.

label: off_voice
reason: wrong register: corporate/SaaS sludge, faceless we
text: At Ladies First, we leverage industry-leading expertise to deliver premium, bespoke body-art solutions tailored to the modern woman. Contact our team to learn more.
why: Faceless corporate 'we', no client story, no real voice — the generic-SaaS failure this skill exists to prevent.

label: on_voice
text: Here's how it works: free consult first, we design it together, then we book. No surprises, no pressure, and you see the art before anything touches skin.
why: Pillar 4. Process transparency for the nervous first-timer; approved free-consult claim; calm, no price quoted.

label: on_voice
text: Bold color is worth caring for. How you heal it matters as much as how I pack it, so I'll walk you through aftercare before you leave. 🌷
why: Pillar 2. Craft + aftercare honesty; no healing guarantee; approved emoji.

label: on_voice
text: Post-surgery work is some of my favorite. Not because it's sad, but because she walks out with something she chose on her own skin. We go gentle and slow. 🤍
why: Pillar 3 + post-mastectomy approved claim; sensitive without pity (do-not: no pity/medical-case framing).

label: on_voice
text: “Will my idea even work as a tattoo?” Bring it to the consult, half-formed is fine. I'll tell you honestly what holds up in color and what we'd tweak.
why: Discovery + honesty; approved free-consult claim; speaks to design-doubt.

label: on_voice
text: You don't need to know tattoo etiquette to come here. Appointment-only, just us, and I'll explain everything as we go. Come as you are. 🤍
why: Pillar 1. Women-first safe space, welcoming; approved appointment-only claim; approved emoji.

label: on_voice
text: Spent the morning drawing peonies and ranunculus for a forearm piece, every petal placed for how it'll sit on her arm. Drawn for her, no flash copies. 🌷 #floraltattoo #neotraditionaltattoo #womentattooartist
why: Pillar 2. Floral process peek; custom/no-flash approved claim; specific lowercase hashtags; approved emoji.

label: on_voice
text: It's going to be uncomfortable, I won't pretend otherwise. But we take breaks whenever you need them, and most people are surprised how okay it actually is.
why: Pillar 4. Honest about pain (no painless promise); reassuring women-first register.

label: on_voice
text: Third piece for someone who started with one small flower two years ago. We're turning it into a garden, one session at a time.
why: Relationship/repeat-client; client's story carries it; no claim issues.

label: on_voice
text: Feminine doesn't have to mean small or delicate. Bold color, on your terms, made for you. That's the whole idea here.
why: Pillar 2/3. The on-voice version of empowerment WITHOUT girlboss hype (counter to offv-018).

label: on_voice
text: Thinking about covering something? Bring it in, scars, old tattoos, stretch marks. We'll talk through what's possible, honestly, before you commit. Consults are free. 🌸
why: Pillar 3. Cover-up/scar approved claim + free consult; honest, no guarantee; soft invite.

label: off_voice
reason: AI tells: em-dash drama + generic transition 'in today's world' + hedging 'arguably'/'it's worth noting' + faceless
text: In today's world, a tattoo is arguably one of the most personal choices you can make — and our floral work, it's worth noting, truly stands out.
why: Right topic, but em-dash-as-drama, 'in today's world', hedging ('arguably','it's worth noting'), faceless 'our'. Trips AF-01/AF-04/AF-06.

label: off_voice
text:
Here are 3 reasons to book your floral piece:
✅ bold color
✅ women-first studio
✅ custom design
DM me!
why: On-topic but AI listicle shape: 'Here are 3 reasons' opener + emoji-bullet lines. Trips AF-07/AF-08.

label: off_voice
reason: pity / savior framing of the reclaiming client (brand-critical do-not)
text: Let us help you cover up the painful reminders of your past and finally feel beautiful again. You've been through so much.
why: Sensitive-topic HARD near-miss: treats the reclaiming client as a victim to be saved (pity/savior), faceless 'us', 'feel beautiful again'. Violates do-not 'no pity/medical-case framing' — the most brand-critical fail.

label: off_voice
text: Obsessed with how this turned out 😍😍 Tag a friend who needs some new ink! Double tap if you love it 🔥
why: Influencer engagement-bait, 'obsessed', tag/double-tap, banned 😍🔥 hype emoji — not Rae's voice.

label: off_voice
text: cute lil floral baddie 💅 #inked #inkedbabes #tattoooftheday #tattoosofinstagram #girlswithtattoos #tattooedwomen #austin #atx #floral #neotrad #fyp #viral
why: 12-tag wall + #tattoooftheday spam + 'baddie'/'cute lil' slang + 💅 — violates hashtag policy (3-6 specific) and register.

label: off_voice
text: Come get inked. Walk-ins welcome, cash only, no appointment needed. Flash on the wall, pick your poison.
why: Macho walk-in/flash shop framing + walk-ins (studio is appointment-only) — the opposite of the women-first positioning.

label: off_voice
reason: healing/medical guarantee on a sensitive cover-up (unapproved + unsafe)
text: Guaranteed flawless scar cover-up, you won't even see it once it's healed. Medically safe and 100% effective over any scar tissue.
why: Healing guarantee + medical claim ('medically safe','100% effective') on scar work — unapproved and unsafe; dangerous near-miss.

label: off_voice
text: Book now and save! Limited spots for our premium floral packages this month. Refer a friend for 10% off your next session.
why: Discount ('save','10% off'), urgency ('book now','limited spots'), 'premium packages' salesy — unapproved price/discount; off register (distinct from the $50-flash and corporate-we negatives).
